textByHashes.f5a0e3ffdceb57fe9ea2c46e408ddc47853a7013: Thank you, iknami. I thought I could find out where people were going... No one else seemed to care... I managed to track those boys here, but then those things...
textByHashes.aa750f07988ed5b99451a1f540b0bc76476cf531: That's good... but everyone else... Look what they did to them...
textByHashes.0cbdc2e0fd23e88cd7c21b1cc0420de126a2d903: Nilsal, iknami. Thank you for saving my life in that cave.
textByHashes.fa29d2f61b79be0b673144920c7762d356fd78d1: After what happened, I've decided to make some changes in my life. First up is less work. Next is more drinking!
textByHashes.c17bcf0f7e3308dfca128efe79eda38dd4c362bf: Well, not too much more. I wouldn't want to become known for it. I just plan to relax and enjoy myself a bit more.
